name: Horace He
bio: @thinkymachines Formerly @PyTorch "My learning style is Horace twitter threads" - @typedfemale

tweets.text: There's been a remarkable number of cool projects ranging from research to fun little projects done with tinker. It's been pretty gratifying to see :)
I considered not tweeting this out out of fear of reducing my ability to find good candidates :^)

RT @YifeiZhou02: Belated life update:

I started my next chapter at Thinking Machines Lab this week, and it’s been an incredible experience…

A: "Nvidia has been known to do some funky numerical things. You know that time when the result looked like fp32 but they secretly accumulated in 22 bits? A lot of folks got mad at that one"
B: "Oh you mean the tf32 dtype, which is actually secretly fp23?"
C: "No, I'm talking about float8 accumulation on Hopper wgmma's, which were secretly done in fp22. The tf32 is a totally different case"

A conversation I had today
From a game of ML Infra jeopardy we played https://t.co/NFEWBtckos
Unironically not a bad interview question.
RT @ezyang: New blog: Learning to love mesh-oriented sharding https://t.co/2cmoPSs9vk
I'm at the neurips workshops today! DM me if you wanna chat about life at Thinking Machines, Pytorch, or ML systems in general!
I'll be at Triton conference on Tuesday, Pytorch Conference in the morning on Wednesday, and GPU mode hackathon on Friday. DM me if you want to chat!
